title: RNA Sequence to Discern Coronavirus Genome Structure
author: Mitra, Manu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
1. A model of pX330-U6-Chimeric_BB-CBh-hSpCas9 is used to understand RNA sequence 
2. It can be used to comprehend RNA sequence of coronavirus and its genome structure 
3. Comparison of “pX330-U6-Chimeric_BB-CBh-hSpCas9” RNA and coronavirus RNA can be made to understand the genome structure of coronavirus
steps_raw:
